title: refactor architecture
body: Migrate ARCHITECTURE.json from legacy {$schema:c4, role, children} tree to canonical schemaVersion 2.0 columns/tree. Source nodes used id+role; converted to name/role/id/detail with the canonical 4 columns. Long role cells (>300 chars: thesis-energy-floor 706, hypotheses-verified 1595, hypotheses-abstract 1838, etc.) losslessly decomposed into one-fact child nodes (each <=300 chars, <=6 piled items). All ids normalized to unique kebab-case. ssot_note preserved as a node; convergence block kept verbatim. 72 nodes, architecture lint ok.
